bakaChat.hint.doubleClickToChat: Double-click Lil' Baka to open chat
bakaChat.conversations.label: Conversations
bakaChat.newConversation.label: New conversation
bakaChat.config.model.label: Model
bakaChat.warning.aiMayMakeErrors: AI may make errors. Avoid high-risk operations.
bakaChat.notConfigured.label: AI model not configured. Please set up a model first.
bakaChat.empty.label: Say something to start chatting...
bakaChat.toolResult.label: Tool result
bakaChat.tools.label: Tools
bakaChat.tools.loadError: Failed to load tools. Is the backend running?
bakaChat.tools.registry.GetResourceDetai: Fetch full information for one resource by ID (tool name is fixed for the model).
bakaChat.tools.registry.GetResourcesById: Fetch multiple resources in one call using numeric database IDs.
bakaChat.tools.registry.DeleteResourcesB: Remove resources from the library by ID. Optionally delete underlying files on disk when deleteFiles is true (irreversible).
Search the media library by keyword.
bakaChat.tools.registry.PlayResource.des: Open a resource with the system default player.
bakaChat.tools.registry.PlayRandomResour: Play a random item from the library.
bakaChat.tools.registry.SetResourcePrope: Change a property value on a resource.
bakaChat.tools.registry.SaveBase64File.d: Save a base64-encoded file to temporary storage (e.g. for covers).
bakaChat.tools.registry.TranslateText.de: Translate text using the configured translation service.
bakaChat.tools.registry.GetFileInfo.name: File information
bakaChat.tools.registry.GetFileInfo.desc: Read file name, size, and modification time from a path.
bakaChat.tools.registry.ListFiles.name: List files
bakaChat.tools.registry.ListFiles.desc: List files in a directory path.
bakaChat.tools.registry.RunEnhancerOnRes: Run one enhancer on a single resource; results go to properties defined by the enhancer. Configure cookies, API keys, and enhancer options in system settings first.
bakaChat.tools.registry.GetResourceProfi: List profiles that match a resource and the effective enhancer bindings (IDs, targets, keyword property). Read-only; tool name is fixed for the model.
